name: RoboForm
tagline: Best form-filling with desktop-grade password management
description: RoboForm pioneered form-filling and still offers the best auto-fill experience, with powerful desktop apps and competitive pricing.
longDescription: RoboForm has been around since 1999 and pioneered browser form-filling. That heritage shows — RoboForm's form-filling capability is still the best in the industry, handling complex multi-page forms, identity profiles, and custom fields better than any competitor. The desktop apps are powerful with a traditional Windows-style interface that some users prefer. Security is solid with AES-256 encryption and a zero-knowledge architecture. The password generator, bookmark manager, and secure notes add practical value. While the mobile apps feel dated compared to modern competitors and there's no dark web monitoring, RoboForm remains an excellent choice for users who prioritize form-filling and a traditional desktop experience.

keyFeatures.name: Advanced Form-Filler
keyFeatures.description: Industry-leading form-filling with support for complex multi-page forms, identity profiles, and custom fields. Handles job applications, tax forms, and registrations.

keyFeatures.name: Bookmark Manager
keyFeatures.description: Built-in secure bookmark management. Organize, sync, and protect your bookmarks with the same encryption used for passwords.

keyFeatures.name: Identity Profiles
keyFeatures.description: Create multiple identity profiles with different personal information. Automatically fill the correct identity based on context.

keyFeatures.name: Security Center
keyFeatures.description: Audits your entire vault for weak, reused, and duplicate passwords. Provides an overall security score and actionable recommendations.

verdict: RoboForm is the best choice for users who frequently fill out complex forms and prefer a traditional desktop application. The form-filling capability is genuinely unmatched, and the pricing is competitive. The dated mobile apps and lack of dark web monitoring are the main drawbacks.

faqs.question: What makes RoboForm's form-filling special?
faqs.answer: RoboForm has been refining form-filling since 1999. It handles complex scenarios like multi-page forms, conditional fields, and custom input types better than any competitor. It can fill 8 different identity profiles with distinct information for different contexts.

faqs.question: Is RoboForm still actively developed?
faqs.answer: Yes, RoboForm receives regular updates and is actively maintained. While the interface style is more traditional, the underlying technology is modern with AES-256 encryption and zero-knowledge architecture. The company is profitable and stable.

author.name: Alex Chen
author.title: Senior Cybersecurity Analyst
author.bio: Alex has tested over 30 password managers across 5 years.

seoMeta.title: RoboForm Review 2026: 8.5/10 Rating | TrueTopReviews
